channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Allstate Sugar Bowl postponed
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Caesars Superdome was placed under lockdown Wednesday after a pickup truck drove into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away, killing at least 15 people and injuring dozens, city and federal officials said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Top-seeded Oregon sees title hopes dashed with early knockout by Ohio State
item.description: Oregon withstood many challenges en route to being the only unbeaten team and the top seed in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Penn State takes simple approach during ride into CFP semifinals
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Football coaches, perhaps more than in other sports, are huge proponents of structure, routine, consistent messaging. Since the early days of his time in Happy Valley, Penn State's James Franklin has adhered to the philosophy of 1-0. Yes, it's a cliche.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rose Parade 2025: 136th edition draws largest crowds since pre-pandemic
item.description: 'Best day ever': Hundreds of thousands take to Pasadena for colorful, energetic New Year's Day celebration.
item.dc:creator: David Wilson, The Mercury News

item.title: Pistons guard Jaden Ivey sustains leg injury in victory over the Magic
item.description: Detroit guard Jaden Ivey sustained what appeared to be a severe injury to his lower left leg in the fourth quarter of Detroit’s victory over the Orlando Magic on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dave Hogg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni set to rest Saquon Barkley in finale and end chance at NFL rushing record
item.description: Saquon Barkley had a heart-to-heart talk with his dad that was more coated in heartbreak than hope over the Philadelphia Eagles running back's pursuit of the NFL single-season rushing record.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Skattebo's do-it-all show is not enough to overcome Arizona State's 4th-down woes against Texas
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Cam Skattebo's do-it-all offensive show wasn't enough to save Arizona State from a stretch of fourth-down failures against Texas. Led by Skattebo, the senior running back, Arizona State compiled big advantages in rushing yards, total yards and time of possession.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Sugar Bowl announces new start time after postponement amid New Orleans attack
item.description: The Allstate Sugar Bowl announced that the game will start at 4 p.m. ET on Thursday after Wednesday's deadly attack in New Orleans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas survives double OT scare from Arizona State in college football playoff thriller
item.description: Texas defensive back Andrew Mukuba hauled in an interception to clinch a college football playoff win after a shocking effort from underdog Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas avoids huge upset, beats Arizona State 39-31 in double overtime at Peach Bowl
item.description: Texas avoided the first big upset of the College Football Playoff, hitting a fourth-and-long touchdown pass to keep the game going and beating Arizona State 39-31 in double overtime when an interception by Andrew Mukuba finally ended a Peach Bowl quarterfinal classic.
item.dc:creator: Paul Newberry, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Texas avoids huge upset, beats Arizona State 39-31 in double overtime at Peach Bowl
item.description: Cam Skattebo led the Sun Devils back from a 16-point deficit in the fourth quarter and put his team ahead for the first time all day with a TD run to start overtime.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: SEC commissioner speaks out on Sugar Bowl postponement amid New Orleans attack as fans, pundits weigh in
item.description: Football fans and pundits on social media were divided about the decision to postpone the Sugar Bowl in the wake of Wednesday's New Orleans attack.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jimmy Garoppolo to make debut for playoff-bound Rams in place of Matthew Stafford against Seahawks
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Jimmy Garoppolo will take his first snaps for the Rams when he starts in place of Matthew Stafford in playoff-bound Los Angeles' regular-season finale against Seattle on Sunday. Coach Sean McVay announced the decision Wednesday to rest Stafford, the 16-year veteran starter.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gauff and Fritz put US in United Cup semifinals. Kazakhstan beats Germany to advance
item.description: PERTH, Australia (AP) — Coco Gauff and Taylor Fritz powered the U.S., tournament winner two years ago, into the semifinals of the United Cup mixed teams tennis event on Wednesday. In the first singles match, Gauff had a 7-6 (4), 6-2 win over China's Zhang Shuai.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James' youngest son Bryce commits to Arizona
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (AP) — Bryce James, son of NBA star LeBron James, is heading to Arizona. Bryce James announced his decision Wednesday on Instagram and his father had a quick response. “CONGRATULATIONS MAXIMUS!!,” LeBron James posted.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big 12 power rankings: Iowa State on top, West Virginia climbs (after the Kansas stunner) and Utah lands in the cellar
item.description: The Mountaineers stunned Kansas (in Lawrence) and are just behind the Cyclones in the Hotline's latest look at the Big 12 hierarchy.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Aggies improve to 13-1 after 69-64 win over Nevada
item.description: RENO, Nev. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men's basketball (13-1, 3-0 MW) closed out 2024 with a victory, wrapping up an undefeated three-game road trip with a 69-64 win over Nevada at the Lawlor Event Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 5 Penn State bottles up Jeanty, beats No. 8 Boise State 31-14 in Fiesta Bowl
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Penn State defenders clogged every hole, stretched out every outside run, closed with ferocity. Everywhere that Ashton Jeanty turned, he ran into Nittany Lions. The Heisman Trophy runner-up still went over 100 yards, but he sure had to work for it.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travis Kelce receives most fan votes for 2025 Pro Bowl
item.description: Despite a rather subpar season by his own standards, Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce still managed to receive the most votes for the 2025 Pro Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Moment of silence for former President Jimmy Carter held before the Falcons-Commanders game
item.description: Jimmy Carter was honored with a moment of silence before the Atlanta Falcons’ game at the Washington Commanders on Sunday night, hours after the 39th president of the United States died at the age of 100 in Plains, Georgia.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5
